underlying_goal: Understand, validate, document, and fix behaviors of the Gen3 rule engine (vs Gen2) including classic/multipass, sticky bits, NOT+OR/NOT+NEAR operators, with code-verified Confluence docs and tests
friction_detail: Confluence page corrupted via Unicode double-encoding, initial REST-based playground approach rejected in favor of ASP, and several user interrupts to redirect approach (no worktree, use ASP).
brief_summary: User wanted to explain, document, validate, and fix Gen3 rule engine behaviors; Claude delivered explanations, fixed a sticky-OR overcounting bug with tests, updated Confluence docs, and rewired the playground to ASP, mostly succeeding though some validation/forensics gaps remained.
